subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast been struck by a most grievous calamity, thou whose soul is touched by the sacred breaths of the Most Great Name and the Spirit of Christ, the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اصابته مصیبه کبری نفوسیکه بانفاس مقدسه اسم اعظم و روح مسیح جمال قدیم
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
